THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHARTON, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 131 ALBION ST, #10, S.F, CA. $2,120.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,120.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-02-1994, DEF. TO PAY TO PL. $100 MO. BY 15TH OF EACH MO. STARTING 2-1-94. IF ANY PMT. MISSED, FULL BAL BECOMES DUE. NO INT. ACCRUES AS LONG AS PMTS ARE TIMELY. UPON MISSING PMT. INT. ACCRUES AT LEGAL RATE FROM DATE OF JUDGMENT. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
